profile_description: Rent-to-rent — lead renting a property from a landlord and wanting Stayful to manage their STL operation
typical_situation: Lead has signed or is considering a lease on a property and wants to sublet it on STL platforms. This creates a layered cost structure (their landlord rent + Stayful fee) that compresses margins severely.
typical_motivation: Leverage someone else's property. Build STL portfolio without owning assets.
typical_timeline: Variable. But qualifier: most R2R leads should be identified and disqualified early — margins rarely work.
what_meeting_should_lead_with: QUALIFY FIRST. Before any pitch: 'What are you paying your landlord per month?' If the economics don't work, say so early.
